item.title: DataVare Address Book Manager Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: DataVare Address Book Manager Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: contactconversion
item.itunes:summary:
DataVare Address Book Manager Tool
(Utilities)
Make use of DataVare Address Book Manager software to directly move contacts from OST, PST, MSG, MBOX, CSV, and Excel files. Users can easily utilize this software to take contacts from multiple files. The application is fully safe to use. There are no chances of data corruption when users use this utility. The program works with all Windows OS versions without creating any problems. The utility didn't take a long time. The tool also supports all MS Outlook editions, such as Outlook 2021, Outlook 2019, Outlook 2016, Outlook 2013, Outlook 2010, Outlook 2007, Outlook 2003, Outlook 2002, etc. Another feature of this software is that users can also make use of it to split single large VCF contacts into small parts, and the software can also combine multiple single VCF contacts into one. The software is fully standalone for these activities. Grab the free demo edition without paying a single dime.
Click Here: https://www.datavare.com/software/address-book-converter.html
[read more]
item.description:
DataVare Address Book Manager Tool
(Utilities)
Make use of DataVare Address Book Manager software to directly move contacts from OST, PST, MSG, MBOX, CSV, and Excel files. Users can easily utilize this software to take contacts from multiple files. The application is fully safe to use. There are no chances of data corruption when users use this utility. The program works with all Windows OS versions without creating any problems. The utility didn't take a long time. The tool also supports all MS Outlook editions, such as Outlook 2021, Outlook 2019, Outlook 2016, Outlook 2013, Outlook 2010, Outlook 2007, Outlook 2003, Outlook 2002, etc. Another feature of this software is that users can also make use of it to split single large VCF contacts into small parts, and the software can also combine multiple single VCF contacts into one. The software is fully standalone for these activities. Grab the free demo edition without paying a single dime.
Click Here: https://www.datavare.com/software/address-book-converter.html
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
DataVare Address Book Manager Tool
(Utilities)
Make use of DataVare Address Book Manager software to directly move contacts from OST, PST, MSG, MBOX, CSV, and Excel files. Users can easily utilize this software to take contacts from multiple files. The application is fully safe to use. There are no chances of data corruption when users use this utility. The program works with all Windows OS versions without creating any problems. The utility didn't take a long time. The tool also supports all MS Outlook editions, such as Outlook 2021, Outlook 2019, Outlook 2016, Outlook 2013, Outlook 2010, Outlook 2007, Outlook 2003, Outlook 2002, etc. Another feature of this software is that users can also make use of it to split single large VCF contacts into small parts, and the software can also combine multiple single VCF contacts into one. The software is fully standalone for these activities. Grab the free demo edition without paying a single dime.
Click Here: https://www.datavare.com/software/address-book-converter.html
[read more]

item.title: pwall [Image Viewers]
item.itunes:title: pwall [Image Viewers]
item.itunes:author: ltiber
item.itunes:summary:
pwall
(Image Viewers)
Browse your photos/videos with pwall.
This app is modern style photo/video viewer and organizer.
It shows the folders of your photos/videos main directory in the left pane and a photowall in the right.
The photowall is a scrolling panel of square thumbnails giving a preview of each photo/video.
Loading and unloading of this scrolling panel is made dynamically, viewing page by viewing page
like smartphones do.
It also allows you to have basics management of photos/videos
(change dates, copy a group of photos to another directory, delete, share, get GPS data...).
Clicking on a photo opens it in fullscreen mode. You can continue your navigation in this mode with left and right keys.
I use it as an alternative to Shotwell.

It has been tested in ubuntu 16.04, 18.04, 20.04 and has been built over the GTK 3 framework.
To enjoy all the features, you also need to install jhead, ffmpeg and gstreamer libraries
with sudo apt install jhead ffmpeg libgstreamer1.0-0 gstreamer1.0-plugins-base gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav gstreamer1.0-pulseaudio
To install the .deb file, run sudo dpkg -i pwall-x.x-x.deb (where -x.x-x is the version you've downloaded).
If you've got dependency errors run sudo apt install -f
[read more]
item.description:
pwall
(Image Viewers)
Browse your photos/videos with pwall.
This app is modern style photo/video viewer and organizer.
It shows the folders of your photos/videos main directory in the left pane and a photowall in the right.
The photowall is a scrolling panel of square thumbnails giving a preview of each photo/video.
Loading and unloading of this scrolling panel is made dynamically, viewing page by viewing page
like smartphones do.
It also allows you to have basics management of photos/videos
(change dates, copy a group of photos to another directory, delete, share, get GPS data...).
Clicking on a photo opens it in fullscreen mode. You can continue your navigation in this mode with left and right keys.
I use it as an alternative to Shotwell.

It has been tested in ubuntu 16.04, 18.04, 20.04 and has been built over the GTK 3 framework.
To enjoy all the features, you also need to install jhead, ffmpeg and gstreamer libraries
with sudo apt install jhead ffmpeg libgstreamer1.0-0 gstreamer1.0-plugins-base gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav gstreamer1.0-pulseaudio
To install the .deb file, run sudo dpkg -i pwall-x.x-x.deb (where -x.x-x is the version you've downloaded).
If you've got dependency errors run sudo apt install -f
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
pwall
(Image Viewers)
Browse your photos/videos with pwall.
This app is modern style photo/video viewer and organizer.
It shows the folders of your photos/videos main directory in the left pane and a photowall in the right.
The photowall is a scrolling panel of square thumbnails giving a preview of each photo/video.
Loading and unloading of this scrolling panel is made dynamically, viewing page by viewing page
like smartphones do.
It also allows you to have basics management of photos/videos
(change dates, copy a group of photos to another directory, delete, share, get GPS data...).
Clicking on a photo opens it in fullscreen mode. You can continue your navigation in this mode with left and right keys.
I use it as an alternative to Shotwell.

It has been tested in ubuntu 16.04, 18.04, 20.04 and has been built over the GTK 3 framework.
To enjoy all the features, you also need to install jhead, ffmpeg and gstreamer libraries
with sudo apt install jhead ffmpeg libgstreamer1.0-0 gstreamer1.0-plugins-base gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav gstreamer1.0-pulseaudio
To install the .deb file, run sudo dpkg -i pwall-x.x-x.deb (where -x.x-x is the version you've downloaded).
If you've got dependency errors run sudo apt install -f
[read more]

item.title: STE simple text editor [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: STE simple text editor [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: djmaxcz
item.itunes:summary:
STE simple text editor
(Terminal Apps)
simple-text-editor
This project aims to provide a simple text editor with basic functionalities like creating, opening, editing, and saving text files.
if plugins doesnt work move the plugins and delete the folder
This program is a simple text editor implemented in Bash script. It provides basic functionalities like creating new files, opening existing files, editing files, saving files, searching for words, replacing words, counting words, and deleting files.
Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:
Create a new file
open an existing file
Edit an existing file
Save file
Save As
Search for a word
Replace a word
Word Count
support plugins
Delete a file
Exit
Vim Version
This program also has a Vim version It have same functionalities as the Bash script version but it opens the Vim text editor

Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:
Create a new file
pen an existing file
Edit an existing file
Save file
Save As
support plugins
Delete a file
Exit
[read more]

simple-text-editor
This project aims to provide a simple text editor with basic functionalities like creating, opening, editing, and saving text files.

This program is a simple text editor implemented in Bash script. It provides basic functionalities like creating new files, opening existing files, editing files, saving files, searching for words, replacing words, counting words, and deleting files.
Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:
Create a new file
open an existing file

Search for a word
Replace a word
Word Count
support plugins

This program also has a Vim version It have same functionalities as the Bash script version but it opens the Vim text editor

Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:
Create a new file
pen an existing file
Edit an existing file
Save file
Save As
support plugins
Delete a file
Exit
[read more]

STE simple text editor
(Terminal Apps)
simple-text-editor
This project aims to provide a simple text editor with basic functionalities like creating, opening, editing, and saving text files.
if plugins doesnt work move the plugins and delete the folder
This program is a simple text editor implemented in Bash script. It provides basic functionalities like creating new files, opening existing files, editing files, saving files, searching for words, replacing words, counting words, and deleting files.
Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:
Create a new file
open an existing file
Edit an existing file
Save file
Save As
Search for a word
Replace a word
Word Count
support plugins
Delete a file
Exit
Vim Version
This program also has a Vim version It have same functionalities as the Bash script version but it opens the Vim text editor

Here's a brief overview of its functionalities:
Create a new file
pen an existing file
Edit an existing file
Save file
Save As
support plugins
Delete a file

item.title: Something for Poco F3/Redmi k40/Mi 11x [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Something for Poco F3/Redmi k40/Mi 11x [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: xeesan
item.itunes:summary:
Something for Poco F3/Redmi k40/Mi 11x
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
a fork of AOSPA, with extra features and a brand new design
Like a asteroid or a minor planet orbiting around AOSPA
SomethingOS do not pretend to be better than any other, take that fits you the best and if you decide to install Something, thank you !
[read more]
